steps.name: article-output-schema
steps.summary: Added the pure article writer output schema contract: required structured fields, public-route compatible slug/tag normalization, source/evidence-backed factual claim checks, block decision handling, post_generation_runs fields, and ready_to_publish-only draft output without public exposure or external LLM/publish side effects.

steps.name: persona-and-mode-selection
steps.summary: Added the persona and mode selection contract: experiment mode now requires concrete experiment evidence, and generation runs record persona version, selected article mode, input source ids, personal context ids, prompt hash, and output hash without LLM, DB, or publish side effects.

steps.name: quality-gate-publish-decision
steps.summary: Added the publish quality gate decision contract: unsafe_claim, privacy_risk, no_evidence, weak_sources, duplicate_topic, and style_drift failures are recorded as quality_gate_results, remain failed_generation/private, and never bypass ready_to_publish into published. Passing generation still only creates ready_to_publish draft content and has no LLM, DB, or publish side effects.

steps.name: daily-cron-draft-to-publish
steps.summary: Added the bounded daily auto article pipeline contract: duplicate daily cron runs cannot publish twice, no_topic/weak_sources/budget_exceeded exits stay private, required publish jobs stop at the configured retry limit, and a successful run moves through ready_to_publish -> publishing -> verifying -> published without external side effects outside adapters.
